_comment: MCP servers for register-mcp.sh to register via `claude mcp add`. Read this as DATA — it carries no secrets. Anything secret (e.g. an API key) is read from the environment at registration time, never stored here. ${HOME} is a marker the script expands; it is not a real path until then.

servers.name: context-layer
servers.comment: The code-intelligence + memory MCP server you built in Part 4. Registered only if its built dist/ file exists.
